name: Cookie Pie Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine the melted margarine and confectioner's sugar.
2. Stir in the baking powder and all-purpose flour until well mixed.
3. Press the dough mixture into a 9-inch pie dish.
4. Prick the surface of the crust with a fork.
5. Bake at 475°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
